reason: Many y_true=1 rows are predicted 0, so recall is roughly 0.7, far below the claimed 0.92.
Slightly positive daily returns (~0.0012 mean) compounded over 500 days give ~0.8 total return, matching the claim.
Mismatch rate in the sample is roughly 21-22%, consistent with the claimed accuracy of 0.7875.
False positives (0,1) among predicted positives appear too frequent for precision 0.81; actual looks closer to ~0.68.
Score column shows only weak separation between classes, consistent with a modest AUC around 0.67.
Typical target-prediction errors are ~1-2, implying RMSE ~1.5, far above the claimed 0.6345.
